TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Norm_Baker, title = Norm_Baker, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Norm_Baker} }

S.FORM: Norm Baker sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1923 , ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 2, Norm Baker, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1989) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Norm Baker sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1923 , ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 2, Norm Baker, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1989) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: norm βaker s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, norm βaker, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
